message:
test(web/extractors): add 16 unit tests for query parameter parsers and JSON redaction

First test module for web/extractors.rs:

- parse_limit: default, explicit, clamped-to-max, invalid, zero
- parse_u64: present, absent, invalid (negative)
- parse_i64: positive, negative, absent
- parse_bool: true variants (1/true/yes/case-insensitive), false variants,
  absent-is-false
- redact_json_value: non-strings unchanged, recurses arrays, recurses objects

All pure function tests with no async or I/O dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
